overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 featuring a cowboy character walking through open prairie grasslands along a dirt path. The character passes a horse rider, continues to a crossroads, and turns left while encountering another rider in the distance. The scene depicts a clear morning in a rural Western setting with high-fidelity game graphics.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie dirt road with ranch fencing

events.description: horse rider appears ahead approaching on the path
passing the horse rider going in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through grassy fields, passing a wooden ranch fence on the left

notable_agents.action: riding a horse toward the camera along the dirt path before passing by

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence lining the left side of the path near a ranch house
small wooden ranch building with a sloped roof visible in the distance
worn dirt trail cutting through the tall grass
tall green grass covering the rolling hills and fields
tree-covered hills forming the horizon line

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through open prairie grasslands, passing a wooden ranch fence and house on the left. A horse rider approaches from the distance and passes by going the opposite direction around the 30-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching rural crossroads in open grassland

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path toward the upcoming crossroads

entered.detail: weathered wooden signpost marking the upcoming intersection

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the dirt path as the ranch buildings fall behind. A wooden signpost becomes increasingly visible on the right side, marking an approaching crossroads in the open prairie.

events.description: character turns left at the crossroads onto a different dirt path
second horse rider visible in the distance ahead on the new path

agents.ego_description: turning left at the crossroads and proceeding along the new path

notable_agents.action: riding a horse away from the camera in the far distance on the path ahead

entered.detail: intersection where multiple dirt paths meet in the grassland
continuation of the trail turning left toward the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the crossroads marked by a wooden signpost and turns left onto a new dirt path. As the character proceeds along the new route, another horse rider becomes visible in the far distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural dirt path that leads from a ranch perimeter toward an open prairie crossroads. It begins with the character walking past a wooden ranch fence and house, just as a horse rider approaches from the distance and passes by in the opposite direction. As the ranch buildings recede into the background, the camera continues forward while a wooden signpost gradually emerges on the right to mark an upcoming intersection. The scene then shifts as the character reaches the crossroads and turns left onto a new path, moving deeper into the grasslands. Finally, the perspective opens up to reveal another horse rider appearing in the far distance ahead.
